title: The World Government’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Usopp, King Harald, Unknown person #6, Giants as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world was plunged into even greater turmoil...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As countless souls set out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In pursuit of the vast treasure Roger left behind... the one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one had anticipated the advent of the great pirate era...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Navy headquarters found itself caught off guard. As a result, more than ten giants were drafted into the Marines from all over the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: in an effort to consolidate strength.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During this stretch of time, Harald waited on the Navy Hand and foot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's an ancient giant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did you see how huge he was?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I wanna make him my slave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And that very year...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was finally granted formal permission to visit the Holy Land.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A shallow-sea contract?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That is correct.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Consider yourself the right hand of the God's knights...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: God's steel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It is a great honor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There are three levels of contract.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The shallow-sea contract is a more minor pact...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The deep-sea and deep-deep sea contracts are reserved for those...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...who are to be bound fully to the true God.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only 13 individuals in the entire world receive that privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What do you mean by "God?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will only come to know the greatest depths of this world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...on the day you become a full knight of God.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Could Elbaf become a member nation then?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: naturally, Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At that point, the entire world would be clamouring to welcome you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm grateful for this opportunity to prove myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What is the great one planning?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captain of the knights of God (figarland family) SAINT GARLING

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'You're gonna OBE! US even though 'You're King of Elbaf?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE KNIGHT'S TEMPLE - SHANGARA, DOMAIN OF THE GODS

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Of course. Just say the word.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll keep a long-distance transgender snail on hand and call if we have need of you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll be free to travel the surface world, but you are forbidden to speak of our dealings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Understood!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
